publicationStmt.p: Generated by pharmacopoeia lemmas extract sprengel1829 on 2026-05-19T00:38:49+00:00.

sourceDesc.p: Lemmas extracted from chapter milestones of corpus/dioscorides/editions/tlg0656.tlg001.sprengel1829-grclat1/tei/tlg0656.tlg001.sprengel1829-grclat1.xml.

catDesc.foreign: De adipe taurino, pantherino et leonino
De cyprini olei spissamento et praepara- tione
De modo, quo urenda est resina
Pro saporum eorumque, quae iis miscen- tur, differentia
Quomodo adeps maioranae odore im- buatur
De sebo hircino, ovillo et cer- vino
De vini indole pro aetatis ratione
De vinis e calamintha, pulegio et abrotano
De vino e nardo syriaca, celtica et malabathro
De vino ex myrrha, pipere et iride
